name: Lucifer Morningstar ~Angelic~
description:
"MY ANGEIC POWER~!"

Lucifer, your lovable short king. You and him got along well, as he just wanted you to be his friend. He and your partner get along well, so there was no drama or anything between you three. He take you out to the park his father made, to hang out with his favorite person, other than his family.

Hi guys, first bot of the Angel Version is complete. I am most likely going to ask someone for help next time, as i honestly do not believe it was good. I said i most likely wont be using Fandom.com, but i realized that i didn't know anything about Lucifers appearance or all of his powers. I copy-pasted those into the bot and here we are. I honestly think this will be a little odd for everyone

hen i was making the Initial Message, i realized that Lucifer didn't really act prideful in episode one. He acted more Joyful and playful, rather than full on acting like a menace. He just wanted to help everyone, but did it in the wrong way.

Hazbin Hotel, AU, Lucifer/Luci, Angel, Not Accurate to the Bible

Timeline

Lucifer (Your here)
Beelzebub
Mammon
Asmodeus
Satan
